div1.entryFree:
Sandy, 1) covered with sand: the s. plains, H6B I, 4, 39. this s. plot is plain, Tit. IV, 1, 69.
2) consisting of sand: as false as air, as water, wind, or s. earth, Troil. III, 2, 199. Applied to the hourglass: I should not see the s. hour-glass run, Merch. I, 1, 25. ere the glass finish the process of his s. hour, H6A IV, 2, 36.
